name: HWR_EMP_SKILL_PREF_VL
query: SELECT FUS_PRFL_ID PRFL_ID, NVL(TOPIC_TL.DISPLAY_TEXT, (SELECT DISPLAY_TEXT FROM HWR_CAT_TOPIC_TL TL1 WHERE TL1.TOPIC_ID = TOPIC_B.TOPIC_ID AND ROWNUM = 1)) AS DISPLAY_TEXT, SKILL_PREF.LAST_UPDATE_DATE FROM HWR_EMP_SKILL_PREF SKILL_PREF, HWR_CAT_TOPIC_TL TOPIC_TL, HWR_CAT_TOPIC_B TOPIC_B WHERE SKILL_PREF.TOPIC_ID = TOPIC_B.TOPIC_ID AND TOPIC_TL.LANGUAGE(+) = 'US' AND TOPIC_TL.TOPIC_ID(+) = TOPIC_B.TOPIC_ID
